top_signals.title: Meta jumps into AI coding market in effort to chase Anthropic and OpenAI

top_signals.title: Wall Street’s boutiques bet on star bankers. Now they’re stuck with the bill

top_signals.title: Injective SDK on npm infected with cryptocurrency wallet stealer
top_signals.summary: Hackers compromised the Injective Labs SDK project's GitHub repository and used it to publish a malicious package on the Node Package Manager (npm) that stole cryptocurrency wallet private keys and mnemonic seed phrases. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: The Hidden Security Risks of Reduced Summer IT Coverage
top_signals.summary: Security operations don't slow down when IT teams take vacation, but staffing levels often do. Kaseya explains how AI-driven automation can help organizations maintain consistent security operations and reduce reliance on manual processes year-round. [...]
